stories.title: Expand Korean stock registry with comprehensive KOSPI/KOSDAQ coverage
acceptanceCriteria: COMPANY_MAP has 60+ entries covering major KOSPI/KOSDAQ sectors (반도체, 2차전지, 바이오, 자동차, 조선, 방산, 전력, 건설, 금융, 유통, 엔터, 게임 etc)
Korean company name variants (e.g. '현대차', '현대자동차', '현차') all map to the same ticker
All tickers use correct suffix: .KS for KOSPI, .KQ for KOSDAQ
COMPANY_PATTERN_STRINGS updated with new company name patterns for signal_gate detection
SECTOR_STOCKS expanded with new sector categories (battery, bio, defense, entertainment, gaming)
FINANCE_KEYWORDS in signal_gate.py expanded with Korean market terms (2차전지, 바이오, 방산, 조선, 전력기기 etc)
Existing tests still pass

stories.title: KOSPI/KOSDAQ ticker code auto-mapping from Korean names
acceptanceCriteria: New function resolve_kr_ticker(name: str) -> tuple[str, str] | None in stock_registry.py that fuzzy-matches Korean company names to (ticker, english_name)
extract_mentions in heuristic_pipeline.py uses resolve_kr_ticker as fallback when COMPANY_MAP miss
Korean suffixes handled: '전자', '화학', '건설', '증권', '보험', '카드', '지주' etc stripped for matching
Test: resolve_kr_ticker('삼성전자') returns ('005930.KS', 'Samsung Electronics')
Test: resolve_kr_ticker('현대차') returns ('005380.KS', 'Hyundai Motor')
Test: resolve_kr_ticker('unknown_company_xyz') returns None

stories.title: kindshot signal feed export
acceptanceCriteria: New module src/omx_brainstorm/kindshot_feed.py with export_signals_for_kindshot(db: SignalTrackerDB, output_path: Path) function
Exports only KR-market signals (ticker ends with .KS or .KQ) with BUY/STRONG_BUY verdict
Output JSON schema: {signals: [{ticker, company_name, signal_source: 'y2i', signal_date, confidence, verdict, channel, evidence}], generated_at}
New CLI command 'export-kindshot-feed' writes to .omx/state/kindshot_feed.json
Scheduler auto-exports after each successful comparison run
Test: export produces correct JSON with KR-only filtered signals

stories.title: Tests pass, commit, and push
acceptanceCriteria: All existing tests pass (pytest)
New tests for resolve_kr_ticker, expanded registry, and kindshot feed export
Changes committed with descriptive message
Pushed to remote
